address: Venneit Close, Roger Dudman Way, Oxford
description: Available for the 2026/27 academic year. An ideally located two bedroom furnished apartment situated close to Oxford Train Station and City Centre. The property comprises of two spacious study bedrooms (one en-suite), separate bathroom, lounge and fully fitted kitchen. Apartments are gas central heating and double glazed throughout. The property also boasts beautifully maintained communal gardens and ample covered bike storage however there is no car parking available. Located just minutes from the City Centre the property is perfectly situated for students studying across the City or even commuters in need of easy access to the train station.
